records.description: Generative AI tool purchased by Lund University and accessible through regular Microsoft 365 login.
records.costToUser: Free of charge for individual departments; part of Microsoft 365 subscription.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI at Lund University | Staff Pages
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Lund University has purchased Microsoft’s Copilot as a generative AI tool. You can access Copilot using your regular Microsoft 365 login.

records.description: AI-based translation tool with Lund University-specific terminology through customized glossaries.
records.howToObtain: Assigned licence through Translation and Language Services.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI at Lund University | Staff Pages
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Lund University (LU) has purchased 200 licenses, which will be distributed to staff across faculties and departments over a one-year period.

records.description: ChatGPT Edu licence available to Lund University teachers and researchers for secure academic support.
records.howToObtain: Apply for the ChatGPT licence via Lucat.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI at Lund University | Staff Pages
evidence.evidenceSnippet: ChatGPT is available free of charge to the university's teachers and researchers for one year via ChatGPT Edu.

records.description: Microsoft Copilot Chat access for Lund University students through their student account.
records.howToObtain: Log in with a Lund University student account.
records.costToUser: Included as part of Lund University's licences.

evidence.sourceTitle: How to use generative AI responsibly | Studying in a digital world
evidence.evidenceSnippet: As a student at Lund University, you can use Microsoft Copilot Chat by logging in with your student account.

records.description: Google Gemini access for Lund University students through their student account.
records.howToObtain: Log in with a Lund University student account.
records.costToUser: Included as part of Lund University's licences.

evidence.sourceTitle: How to use generative AI responsibly | Studying in a digital world
evidence.evidenceSnippet: As a student at Lund University, you can use Google Gemini by logging in with your student account.

records.description: Recommended AI tool for Warwick education use with no special licence required.
records.howToObtain: Access Microsoft Copilot through Warwick's linked Microsoft Copilot route.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI tools for education - University of Warwick
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Warwick AI tools - Copilot is the recommended tool and no special licence is required.

records.description: University-provided Microsoft Copilot access for students and researchers, including enterprise access through University accounts.
records.howToObtain: Sign in with a University of Birmingham account via Microsoft Edge or copilot.microsoft.com.
records.costToUser: Free for students; enterprise access is provided through the University account.

evidence.sourceTitle: Microsoft Copilot GenAI now available for students
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Copilot is a cutting-edge, generative AI tool similar to premium ChatGPT, but you are getting for free!

evidence.sourceTitle: Responsible AI tool selection for researchers
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The University provides approved access to the Enterprise version of Microsoft Co-Pilot which you can access via your University account.

records.description: UWA Enterprise Microsoft CoPilot Chat, described as a closed system where UWA CoPilot data is not used to train Microsoft's model.
records.howToObtain: Log in to UWA's Enterprise version.

evidence.sourceTitle: Gen AI Tools - Artificial Intelligence (AI) - Library Guides
evidence.evidenceSnippet: UWA subscribes to Microsoft CoPilot Chat. The Enterprise version of this Chat is a 'closed system', which means data put into UWA's CoPilot is not used by Microsoft to train their Large Language Model.

records.description: Adobe Express access for UWA students and staff, including embedded AI features.

evidence.sourceTitle: Gen AI Tools - Artificial Intelligence (AI) - Library Guides
evidence.evidenceSnippet: UWA subscribes to Adobe Express for all students and staff, which includes embedded AI features.

records.description: DeepSeek services blocked on UWA-managed networks and devices.
records.howToObtain: Not allowed on University-managed networks and devices.

evidence.sourceTitle: Gen AI Tools - Artificial Intelligence (AI) - Library Guides
evidence.evidenceSnippet: UWA has blocked the use of DeepSeek services on all University-managed networks and devices.

records.description: EndNote 25 features including PDF summaries, translation, and chat.

evidence.sourceTitle: Gen AI Tools - Artificial Intelligence (AI) - Library Guides
evidence.evidenceSnippet: EndNote 25 includes AI features such as PDF summaries, language translation and a chat.

records.description: AI-powered visual collaboration and online whiteboarding tool available with UniID login.
records.howToObtain: Use a UWA UniID to log in to Miro.

evidence.sourceTitle: Gen AI Tools - Artificial Intelligence (AI) - Library Guides
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Use your UniID to login to Miro.

records.description: PowerPoint AI-powered Designer tool for quickly formatting slide decks.

evidence.sourceTitle: Gen AI Tools - Artificial Intelligence (AI) - Library Guides
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Microsoft PowerPoint offers an AI powered Designer tool to quickly format an attractive slide deck.

records.description: Microsoft Copilot Chat access for KTH employees and students with better information security than the free consumer version.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI services | KTH Intranet
evidence.evidenceSnippet: As an employee or student at KTH, you have access to Microsoft Copilot Chat, which offers better information security than the free consumer version.

records.description: ChatGPT access for KTH employees to order through KTH IT Services and Licences.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: ChatGPT is available for employees to order via Order IT Services and Licences.

records.description: Azure OpenAI Service for building custom AI services and APIs with high security and compliance; not available to students.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Azure OpenAI is not available to students at KTH.

records.description: University-approved generative AI service for University data with enterprise data protection.
records.howToObtain: Use Microsoft 365, Microsoft Teams, or the Microsoft Copilot app while logged in with UofG credentials.
records.costToUser: Included in University services; no additional cost specified.

evidence.sourceTitle: University of Glasgow - MyGlasgow - IT - 365 - Copilot - guidance
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Copilot Chat is the only AI service approved for use with University data. Always check for the green shield – it shows you are logged in and enterprise data protection is in place.

records.description: Heidelberg University internal AI platform allowing university members to choose among large language models.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Über die KI-Plattform YoKI können Universitätsmitglieder aus verschiedenen großen Sprachmodellen auswählen.

records.description: Heidelberg University IT service chatbot based on open-source models for IT support questions.
